<parameter=code>
# Move DOWN to shift red blocks to cover remaining S parts

seg = current_frame.segmentation
r_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
s_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S' and n['pixels'] < 100]
g_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print("R blocks:", [(n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'][:4]) for n in r_blocks])
print("S blocks (small):", [(n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'][:4]) for n in s_blocks])
print("G blocks:", [(n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary'][:4]) for n in g_blocks])

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== AFTER DOWN ===")
for r in range(32, 50):
    print(f"{r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][26:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
